Coze

⭐ 5
Agent Platform

ByteDance's agent development platform. Create AI agents with no code, publish to WeChat/Feishu/web. Completely free for personal use, unlimited agent creation, ~1000 calls/day.

Dify

⭐ 4
Agent Platform

Open-source AI app development platform. Visual workflow orchestration, RAG engine, 100+ model integration. Community edition free and self-hostable, cloud free tier: 200 API calls/month.
